title: W3Techiez
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Online learning platform for classes, study material sharing, quizzes, and student learning workflows.
overview: A Laravel-based education platform built for online classes, study material distribution, quizzes, and structured digital learning management.
problem: Students and educators needed a centralized platform to manage online study content, class activity, and quiz-based learning.
solution: Designed the system architecture, database schema, backend workflows, and frontend experience to support online classes, material sharing, and quiz management.
impact: Delivered a complete learning platform with dynamic academic workflows and a scalable foundation for online education.
responsibilities: Created the database schema and backend structure
Built frontend and backend modules end to end

title: Unzip Exam
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Full online examination platform for conducting digital exams with structured exam delivery workflows.
overview: A Laravel-based online exam project created for managing and delivering exams through a controlled digital platform.
problem: Institutions needed a reliable way to conduct online exams with organized exam access and submission handling.
solution: Built the complete exam system architecture, backend, database schema, and frontend workflows for online exam delivery.
impact: Created a complete digital exam platform that supports structured online assessment workflows.
responsibilities: Built backend and frontend exam workflows

title: MSIT Dynamic Website
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Fully dynamic college website with dynamic data loading, page creation, menu creation, and controllable content management.
overview: A dynamic Laravel-powered institutional website where pages, menus, and page data can be controlled from the backend.
problem: The institution needed a controllable website where content, menus, and pages could be updated without hardcoding every change.
solution: Designed dynamic page rendering, menu creation, data calling, and backend content controls for a fully manageable website.
impact: Enabled the institution to manage website content dynamically with a scalable CMS-style architecture.
responsibilities: Created database schema for pages and menus

title: HETC Dynamic Website
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Fully dynamic institutional website with backend-controlled data, pages, and menu management.
overview: A Laravel-based dynamic college website built with controllable page data, dynamic menus, and reusable content structure.
problem: The website needed a flexible backend so institutional content and navigation could be managed dynamically.
solution: Created a dynamic website architecture with backend-driven page creation, data rendering, and menu management.
impact: Reduced manual page maintenance and gave administrators a controllable institutional website system.
responsibilities: Designed the system and database architecture

title: AapnaCare
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Doctor booking website for online appointment booking and healthcare service discovery.
overview: A Laravel-based healthcare booking platform for patients to find doctors and book appointments online.
problem: Patients needed a simpler way to discover doctors and book appointments online.
solution: Built the full doctor booking workflow with backend data structure, appointment handling, and frontend booking pages.
impact: Created a practical healthcare booking system with dynamic doctor and appointment management.

title: Camellia HR Attendance System
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Traceable attendance system with geofencing, multi-branch control, dynamic fence range, and IP blocking.
overview: A Laravel-based HR attendance platform for multi-branch attendance tracking with geofence and IP-based control.
problem: The organization needed reliable attendance tracking across multiple branches with location and network restrictions.
solution: Designed geofence-based attendance, dynamic branch controls, configurable fence range, IP blocking, and traceable attendance logs.
impact: Improved attendance control, traceability, and branch-level attendance governance.
features: IP blocking and traceable attendance logs
responsibilities: Created geofence and branch data models

title: Darpan MSIT
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: College management platform with campus, multi-institution, course, syllabus, intake, and admission details management.
overview: A Laravel-based college management system built for managing institutional data across campus and multi-institution structures.
problem: College information, syllabus, intake, admission, and institution details needed centralized management.
solution: Built a dynamic management platform for campus data, institution details, syllabus, intake, admission, and related academic records.
impact: Centralized major college management workflows into a dynamic administrative platform.

title: Darpan Legmed
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Task management tool for multiple job management, client-based work tracking, and money collection workflows.
overview: A Laravel-based task management and client workflow platform for tracking jobs, work progress, and collection-related activity.
problem: Client jobs, task ownership, work progress, and collection tracking needed a centralized operational system.
solution: Designed and built task, client, job, and collection management workflows with backend-controlled tracking.
impact: Improved operational visibility for client work, task progress, and money collection activities.
responsibilities: Created task and client data models

title: MSIT Enquiry System
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Admission enquiry system for managing student enquiries and admission-related communication.
overview: A Laravel-based enquiry management system created for handling admission-related student enquiries.
problem: Admission enquiries needed structured capture, management, and follow-up handling.
solution: Built enquiry submission, backend management, and admission-related enquiry tracking workflows.
impact: Improved organization and traceability of admission enquiry data.
responsibilities: Implemented frontend enquiry forms and admin views

title: MSIT Feedback System
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Student feedback system based on teacher, subject, and semester-wise feedback workflows.
overview: A Laravel-based feedback platform for collecting student feedback mapped to teachers, subjects, and semesters.
problem: Student feedback needed to be collected and organized teacher-wise, subject-wise, and semester-wise.
solution: Built dynamic feedback workflows with structured mappings between students, teachers, subjects, and semesters.
impact: Enabled organized feedback collection and better academic feedback tracking.

title: Technodisha
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Exam application for scholarship tests with smooth dynamic timing and exam creation workflows.
overview: A Laravel-based exam application created for scholarship testing with dynamic exam timing and configurable exam setup.
problem: Scholarship exams needed a smooth online system for creating exams and managing timed assessment sessions.
solution: Built dynamic exam creation, timing control, backend exam management, and frontend exam-taking workflows.
impact: Delivered a controlled online scholarship exam experience with dynamic test configuration.

title: Technohere
role: Full-Stack Developer, Team Lead & System Architect
description: Exam application for scholarship tests with smooth dynamic timing and configurable exam creation.
overview: A Laravel-based online exam application designed for scholarship testing with dynamic timing and exam setup controls.
problem: Scholarship exam workflows needed a reliable online platform with timing control and flexible exam creation.
solution: Implemented dynamic exam setup, timed test workflows, backend exam controls, and frontend exam delivery screens.
impact: Created a smooth online scholarship exam experience with configurable test management.
